calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-13-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Petitioner Jeffrey Scott Simpson present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to:Jeffrey Paul Rosello.
Decree signed in open court.
